7 // -*- C++ -*-
8 #ifndef ARCGEOSIM_ARCGEOSIM_PHYSICS_LAW_PROPERTYVECTOR_H
9 #define ARCGEOSIM_ARCGEOSIM_PHYSICS_LAW_PROPERTYVECTOR_H
10 /* Author : desrozis at Tue Nov 6 15:11:02 2012
11  * Generated by createNew
12  */
13 
14 #ifdef WIN32
15 #include <ciso646>
16 #endif
17 
18 #include "ArcGeoSim/Physics/Law2/Property.h"
19 
20 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
21 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
22 
23 BEGIN_LAW_NAMESPACE;
24 
25 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
26 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
27 
28 /*
29  * \ingroup Law
30  * \brief Vecteur de proprietes
31  *
32  * Decrit un vecteur de proprietes :
33  * - tableau des proprietes
34  * - mapping inverse propriete => index dans la liste
35  * - somme des tailles des proprietes
36  *
37  * \code
38  * ScalarRealProperty pressure(0,"Pressure");
39  * VectorialRealProperty saturation(1,"Saturation",2); // taille 2
40  * VectorialRealProperty composition(2,"Composition",4);
41  *
42  * PropertyVector v;
43  * v << pressure << saturation << composition;
44  *
45  * \endcode
46  *
47  * ATTENTION : les vecteurs ne sont plus valides si la taille d'une propriete vectorielle change
48  *
49  */
50 class PropertyVector
51 {
52 public:
53 
54  PropertyVector()
55  : m_offset(1)
56  , m_data_size(0)
57  {
58  m_offset[0] = 0;
59  }
60 
61  PropertyVector(const PropertyVector& p)
62  : m_properties(p.m_properties)
63  , m_index(p.m_index)
64  , m_offset(p.m_offset)
65  , m_size(p.m_size)
66  , m_data_size(p.m_data_size)
67  {}
68 
69  PropertyVector& operator=(const PropertyVector& p)
70  {
71  m_properties = p.m_properties ;
72  m_index = p.m_index ;
73  m_offset = p.m_offset ;
74  m_size = p.m_size ;
75  m_data_size = p.m_data_size ;
76  return *this ;
77  }
78 
79  PropertyVector(Arcane::ConstArrayView<Property> properties)
80  : m_properties(properties)
81  , m_offset(m_properties.size()+1)
82  , m_size(m_properties.size())
83  , m_data_size(0)
84  {
85  if(m_properties.size() == 0) return;
86 
87  auto max_id = std::max_element(m_properties.begin(), m_properties.end());
88 
89  m_index.resize(max_id->id()+1);
90  m_size.resize(max_id->id()+1);
91  m_index.fill(-1);
92  m_size.fill(-1);
93 
94  m_offset[0] = 0;
95  for(Arcane::Integer i = 0; i < m_properties.size(); ++i) {
96  const Property& p = m_properties[i];
97  ARCANE_ASSERT((p.isInitialized()),(Arcane::String::format("Property '{0}' is not initialized",p.name()).localstr()));
98  ARCANE_ASSERT((m_index[p.id()] == -1),("Multiple property in array"));
99  m_index[p.id()] = i;
100  m_data_size += p.size();
101  m_size[p.id()] = p.size();
102  m_offset[i+1] = m_data_size;
103  }
104  }
105 
106  ~PropertyVector() {}
107 
109  bool operator==(const PropertyVector& v) const
110  {
111  if(m_index.size() != v.m_index.size()) {
112  return false;
113  }
114  for(auto i=0; i<m_index.size(); ++i) {
115  if(m_index[i] != v.m_index[i])
116  return false;
117  }
118  return true;
119  }
120 
121  bool operator!=(const PropertyVector& v) const
122  {
123  return not operator==(v);
124  }
125 
127  inline Arcane::Integer size() const { return m_properties.size(); }
128 
130  inline void reserve(Arcane::Integer size) { m_properties.reserve(size); }
131 
133  inline void reset() {
134  m_properties.resize(0);
135  m_index.resize(0);
136  m_offset.resize(1);
137  m_offset[0] = 0;
138  m_size.resize(0);
139  m_data_size = 0;
140  }
141 
143  inline const Property& operator[](Integer i) const
144  {
145  return m_properties[i];
146  }
147 
149  inline Property& get(Arcane::Integer i)
150  {
151  return m_properties[i];
152  }
153 
155  inline Arcane::Integer operator[](const Property& p) const
156  {
157  ARCANE_ASSERT((p.isInitialized()),(Arcane::String::format("Property '{0}' is not initialized",p.name()).localstr()));
158  ARCANE_ASSERT((p.id() < m_index.size()),(Arcane::String::format("Property '{0}' is not in vector",p.name()).localstr()));
159  ARCANE_ASSERT((m_index[p.id()] != -1),("Property is not in vector"));
160  return m_index[p.id()];
161  }
162 
164  inline bool contains(const Property& p) const
165  {
166  ARCANE_ASSERT((p.isInitialized()),(Arcane::String::format("Property '{0}' is not initialized",p.name()).localstr()));
167  return not( p.id() >= m_index.size() || m_index[p.id()] == -1 );
168  }
169 
171  PropertyVector& operator<<(const Property& p)
172  {
173  ARCANE_ASSERT((p.isInitialized()),(Arcane::String::format("Property '{0}' is not initialized",p.name()).localstr()));
174 
175  if(contains(p)) return *this;
176 
177  m_properties.add(p);
178 
179  const Integer id = p.id();
180 
181  if(id >= m_index.size()) {
182  const Integer old_size = m_index.size();
183  m_index.resize(id+1);
184  m_size.resize(id+1);
185  for(Integer i = old_size; i < id+1; ++i) {
186  m_index[i] = -1;
187  m_size[i] = 0;
188  }
189  }
190 
191  ARCANE_ASSERT((m_index[id] == -1),(Arcane::String::format("Property '{0}' is not in vector",p.name()).localstr()));
192 
193  m_index[id] = m_properties.size() - 1;
194 
195  m_size[id] = p.size();
196 
197  m_data_size += p.size();
198 
199  m_offset.add(m_data_size);
200 
201  return *this;
202  }
203 
205  PropertyVector& operator<<(const Gump::Property& gp)
206  {
207  ScalarRealProperty p(gp.uniqueId(),gp.fullName()) ;
208  ARCANE_ASSERT((p.isInitialized()),(Arcane::String::format("Property '{0}' is not initialized",p.name()).localstr()));
209 
210  if(contains(p)) return *this;
211 
212  m_properties.add(p);
213 
214  const Integer id = p.id();
215 
216  if(id >= m_index.size()) {
217  const Integer old_size = m_index.size();
218  m_index.resize(id+1);
219  m_size.resize(id+1);
220  for(Integer i = old_size; i < id+1; ++i) {
221  m_index[i] = -1;
222  m_size[i] = 0;
223  }
224  }
225 
226  ARCANE_ASSERT((m_index[id] == -1),(Arcane::String::format("Property '{0}' is not in vector",p.name()).localstr()));
227 
228  m_index[id] = m_properties.size() - 1;
229 
230  m_size[id] = p.size();
231 
232  m_data_size += p.size();
233 
234  m_offset.add(m_data_size);
235 
236  return *this;
237  }
238 
239 
241  PropertyVector& operator<<(Arcane::ConstArrayView<Property> properties)
242  {
243  for(Arcane::Integer i = 0; i < properties.size(); ++i)
244  *this << properties[i];
245  return *this;
246  }
247 
249  template<Dimension D, typename T>
250  PropertyVector& operator<<(const Arcane::Array< PropertyT<D,T> >& properties)
251  {
252  for(Arcane::Integer i = 0; i < properties.size(); ++i) {
253  *this << properties[i];
254  }
255  return *this;
256  }
257 
259  inline bool empty() const { return m_properties.size() == 0; }
260 
262  inline Arcane::ConstArrayView<Property> properties() const { return m_properties; }
263 
265  inline Arcane::IntegerConstArrayView index() const { return m_index; }
266 
268  inline Arcane::IntegerConstArrayView propertySize() const { return m_size; }
269 
271  inline Arcane::IntegerConstArrayView offset() const { return m_offset; }
272 
274  inline Arcane::Integer offset(const Property& p) const
275  {
276  ARCANE_ASSERT((contains(p)),(Arcane::String::format("Property '{0}' is not in dependencies",p.name()).localstr()));
277  return m_offset[m_index[p.id()]];
278  }
279 
281  inline Arcane::Integer size(const Property& p) const
282  {
283  ARCANE_ASSERT((contains(p)),(Arcane::String::format("Property '{0}' is not in dependencies",p.name()).localstr()));
284  return m_size[p.id()];
285  }
286 
288  inline void resize(const Property& p, Arcane::Integer size)
289  {
290  ARCANE_ASSERT((contains(p)),(Arcane::String::format("Property '{0}' is not in dependencies",p.name()).localstr()));
291  ARCANE_ASSERT((size <= p.size()),(Arcane::String::format("New size of Property '{0}' should be lesser",p.name()).localstr()));
292 
293  if(size == m_size[p.id()]) return;
294 
295  const Arcane::Integer d = m_size[p.id()] - size;
296 
297  m_size[p.id()] = size;
298 
299  m_data_size -= d;
300 
301  // On doit decaler les offsets suivant
302  for(Arcane::Integer i = m_index[p.id()] + 1; i < m_offset.size(); ++i)
303  m_offset[i] -= d;
304  }
305 
307  inline Arcane::Integer dataSize() const { return m_data_size; }
308 
310  inline void copy(const PropertyVector& properties)
311  {
312  m_properties.copy(properties.m_properties);
313  m_index.copy(properties.m_index);
314  m_offset.copy(properties.m_offset);
315  m_size.copy(properties.m_size);
316  m_data_size = properties.m_data_size;
317  }
318 
319  operator Arcane::ConstArrayView<Property>() const { return m_properties; }
320 
321 private:
322 
324  Arcane::SharedArray<Property> m_properties;
325 
327  Arcane::IntegerSharedArray m_index;
328 
330  Arcane::IntegerSharedArray m_offset;
331 
333  Arcane::IntegerSharedArray m_size;
334 
336  Arcane::Integer m_data_size;
337 };
338 
339 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
340 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
341 
342 inline std::ostream& operator<<(std::ostream& nout, const PropertyVector& v)
343 {
344  for(Integer i = 0; i < v.size(); ++i) {
345  nout << "Property{'" << v[i].name() << "'}[" << v[i].size() << "] ";
346  }
347  return nout;
348 }
349 
350 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
351 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
352 
353 END_LAW_NAMESPACE
354 
355 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
356 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
357 
358 #endif /* ARCGEOSIM_ARCGEOSIM_PHYSICS_LAW_PROPERTYVECTOR_H */
